titleStmt.title: SII 37.223: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 223. (A.R. No. B 327 of 1940-41.) Dēvaguḍi, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar in the mukha maṇḍapa of the Talakanṭama shrine first face.
This is dated Śaka 1220, Viḷambi, Kārtīka ba. 7, Monday, corresponding to 1298 A.D., October 27.

It records the lease deed relating to his worshipping rights executed by the Bairājīya-Nāgejīya, the priest of the Talakaṇṭidēvi temple. The vrittis are stated to have been sold by him for his maintenance during a period of famine in the year Manmatha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[�] svasti . śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1220
gunēṁṭi viḷaṁbi saṁvatsara kārttika ba
haḷa 7 sō . taḷakaṁṭidēvi pūjāri ba I
rajiyala nāgejiya manumatha
saṁvatsara kaṟuvunāṁḍu tanaku ja
ragakapōItōḍipāḍlavāri saṁmadi lēka
jeḍala malla jiyalakunu tanapālivri
ttilōnu varusa dinamulalō nālavu
gūḍanu nāmūṁḍavapālu krayamu
gānu Aṁmikoṁnavi varahani rūkalu

māḍalu 824 ṭi
ki nīvārikini Ika
tōḍi nālgu vāḍla
vāru maṟaṁdaḷapōṭi taḷeprōle ba I reṁgā
rugūḍanu Inumaḍi veṭi vṛtti viḍipi
ṁcinavire 48 nalubai Enimidi rūkalū
nu vrayamu dagilinavi re 24 rūkalū
nu Ubhayamu re 72 saṁ nālgurūka
la māḍlu ga 18 padunenimidi māḍluṁ be
ṭi viḍipiṁciri mīṁda nokanāṁṭiki ni
nāgekoḍuku bayaṁḍu I vritti tanadani
penaṁgarādu dīniki sākṣulu taḷajīyu
la patrānanuṁna tabasalu Aṁtavaṭu vāruṁ
nu Ī reṁḍu deṟaṁgulavārini Iṁḍimu
ḍi muḍipiṁcina kāṁpu sākṣulu daṁḍulū
ri malināyuṁḍu māramareḍi caṁgama reḍi
bōḍreḍi dēsaya bhatuṁḍu jakaya pallaya
Agini mūrtti sāyaṇaṁ dēvaya karaṇa
Digital edition of SII 37.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
